items.title: BYU shooting guard Richie Saunders, who was drafted 32nd overall by Memphis last night, is the great-grandson of the inventor of the tater tot.
items.author: cleo22270
items.body_excerpt: Per Saunders’s Wikipedia page ) “A great-grandson of Ore-Ida founder and inventor of the Tater Tot F. Nephi Grigg,Saunders attended Wasatch Academy.”

items.title: With the 32nd pick of the NBA Draft the Memphis Grizzlies select Richie Saunders!
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
With the 32nd pick of the NBA Draft the Memphis Grizzlies select Richie Saunders!

The 2026 NBA Draft is LIVE on ESPN.

items.title: The only two-way contract free agent for the Memphis Grizzlies is Rayan Rupert, a 2023 second round pick. Richie Saunders (ACL) could slide into that spot with 2025 second round picks Javon Small and Jahmai Mashack occupying the other two spots.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: The only two-way contract free agent for the Memphis Grizzlies is Rayan Rupert, a 2023 second round pick. Richie Saunders (ACL) could slide into that spot with 2025 second round picks Javon Small and Jahmai Mashack occupying the other two spots.

items.title: Memphis Grizzlies take Richie Saunders at pick 32. That was originally the Pacers 2nd round pick. They sent it to the Bucks in a string of deals to move up and get Isaiah Jackson in 2021, then the Bucks sent it to Memphis in a part of their trade for Grayson Allen.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Memphis Grizzlies take Richie Saunders at pick 32. That was originally the Pacers 2nd round pick. They sent it to the Bucks in a string of deals to move up and get Isaiah Jackson in 2021, then the Bucks sent it to Memphis in a part of their trade for Grayson Allen.

items.title: Sources: The Memphis Grizzlies will select Richie Saunders with the No. 32 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Memphis Grizzlies will select Richie Saunders with the No. 32 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft.

items.title: My guys in this draft: Cam Boozer, Kingston Flemings, Dailyn Swain, Jayden Quaintance, Henri Veesar, Richie Saunders, Bruce Thornton
items.author: Steph Noh
items.body_excerpt:
My guys in this draft: Cam Boozer, Kingston Flemings, Dailyn Swain, Jayden Quaintance, Henri Veesar, Richie Saunders, Bruce Thornton

Guys I'm fading: Aday Mara (think he'll be fine but overdrafted), Karim Lopez, Nate Ament, Chris Cenac, Koa Peat
